CustomField.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL( ABS_Status__c, "Not Approved"), OOEP_Grant_Total__c + OOLCH_Grant_Total__c + PR100EP_Grant_Total__c + PR100LCH_Grant_Total__c + PR50EP_Grant_Total__c + PR50LCH_Grant_Total__c + SHEP_Grant_Total__c + SHLCH_Grant_Total__c - Total_Capital_Already_Spent_Upfront__c, 0)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Total grant funding not approved for transfer to GR bank account
CustomField.label: Total Grant Fund Not Approved
